title: T-008 — UI: so_create_wizard_modal multi-step Dialog (SHIP-006) (11-shipping-b)
prompt:
# T-008 — SO Create Wizard modal UI

PRD: docs/prd/11-SHIPPING-PRD.md §15.4 SHIP-006 (referenced via §15.1 desktop), §8.1, §11 V-SHIP-SO-01..06
UX: prototypes/design/11-SHIPPING-UX.md §3 SHIP-006 — Sales Order Create Wizard, §4 SO Create Wizard
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/shipping/modals.jsx:115-271 (so_create_wizard_modal)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
4-step wizard Dialog (header → lines → allergen → review) calling `createDraftSO` Server Action at finish; allergen cascade check at step 3 runs server-side via Server Action; matching prototype 1:1.

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/app/(shipping)/orders/_modals/so-create-wizard.tsx` — full-viewport Dialog from packages/ui. Step machine via useReducer (steps: header / lines / allergen / review). Stepper component with aria-current.
2. Step 1 (header): customer Combobox (Drizzle query active customers), shipping_address Select (depends on selected customer, V-SHIP-SO-02 blocks Next if empty), customer_po input, order_date date, promised_ship_date date with V-SHIP-SO-04 (>= order_date) Zod refinement, required_delivery_date date.
3. Step 2 (lines): inline FieldArray (react-hook-form) with product Combobox (FG SSOT — NPD product table query joined with allergens), qty (V-SHIP-SO-06 > 0), unit_price (autofill from products.default_sell_price, V-SHIP-SO-06 > 0), requested_lot optional. "Add Line" / "Remove Line" buttons; V-SHIP-SO-05 blocks Next if 0 lines.
4. Step 3 (allergen): on entering step, calls `checkAllergenConflicts(soDraftState)` Server Action returning ConflictRow[] (server-side `check_allergen_conflicts(so_id)` function); if conflicts → render `allergen_override_modal` inline path (per modals.jsx:837-871) requiring shipping_qa + reason + approver PIN (via @monopilot/e-sign T-124); user without ship.allergen.override sees "escalate to QA" CTA.
5. Step 4 (review): summary card of all collected values; "Save draft" + "Submit" buttons; Submit calls `createDraftSO` then router.push(`/(shipping)/orders/${id}`).
6. URL state persisted via `?wizardStep=1..4` to allow refresh; form state in sessionStorage.
7. Permission gate: `ship.so.create`; allergen override step gates on `ship.allergen.override`.
8. i18n keys `shipping.so.wizard.*` PL/EN.

## Prototype parity
Reference: `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/shipping/modals.jsx:115-271` (so_create_wizard_modal). Verify:
- Size=fullpage Dialog
- 4-step stepper at top
- Each step's field set matches prototype
- Allergen step uses HoldChip badge for each conflict and inline override path
- Review step Summary key-value pairs in `dl/dt/dd`
- Footer: Back / Next / Save Draft / Submit

Known bug to address: BL-SHIP-02 (allergen override inline collapse when shipping_qa active) — fix in this task by always allowing inline override path when shipping_qa session active.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(shipping)/orders/_modals/so-create-wizard.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(shipping)/orders/_modals/__tests__/so-create-wizard.test.tsx [create]
- apps/web/messages/en/shipping.json [modify]
- apps/web/messages/pl/shipping.json [modify]
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/shipping/modals.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the wizard renders, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/shipping/modals.jsx:115-271, then it has the same 4-step structure + Stepper + footer button row — RTL snapshot + Playwright screenshot per step.
2. Given Step 1 with promised_ship_date < order_date, when Next is clicked, then Zod returns V-SHIP-SO-04 error message and Next is disabled.
3. Given Step 2 with 0 lines, when Next is clicked, then V-SHIP-SO-05 error renders and Next disabled.
4. Given Step 3 with allergen conflicts and shipping_qa session, when override path is rendered, then it appears inline (BL-SHIP-02 fix) with reason + PIN fields; submit calls overrideAllergenConflict Server Action (T-007).
5. Given Step 4 Submit clicked, when createDraftSO returns success, then router.push to /orders/{id} and toast confirms.
6. UI closeout includes Playwright trace + 4 per-step screenshots per UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY; Playwright fallback documented if unavailable.

## Test strategy
- RED: RTL specs per step + Zod refinement tests + permission-gate test for allergen override path.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run so-create-wizard.test.tsx`.
- Playwright `apps/web/e2e/shipping-so-create.spec.ts` captures full 4-step flow.

## Risk red lines
- Do not import @radix-ui/react-dialog outside packages/ui.
- Do not run allergen cascade purely client-side (must call server check_allergen_conflicts).
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim.
- Do not bypass server-side createDraftSO Zod re-validation.
- Do not regress accessibility (axe).
- Do not perpetuate BL-SHIP-02 collapse bug — inline path required when shipping_qa active.

pipeline_inputs.description: SHIP-006 SO Create Wizard 4-step Dialog matching so_create_wizard_modal prototype (BL-SHIP-02 fix included).
pipeline_inputs.details: Use useReducer for step machine. FieldArray for lines. Server-side allergen cascade call at step 3. Allergen override inline path always available when shipping_qa session (BL-SHIP-02). e-sign PIN via @monopilot/e-sign (T-124).
out_of_scope: Do not build SO list or detail pages (T-009/T-010).
acceptance_criteria: Given the wizard renders, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/shipping/modals.jsx:115-271 (so_create_wizard_modal), then each of the 4 steps matches the prototype field set and layout — RTL snapshot + Playwright per-step screenshot (parity checklist per UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY).

Given Step 1 with promised_ship_date < order_date, when Next clicked, then V-SHIP-SO-04 error + Next disabled; AND given Step 2 with 0 lines, when Next clicked, then V-SHIP-SO-05 error + Next disabled.
Given Step 3 with allergen conflicts and shipping_qa session, when override path renders, then it appears inline per prototype + e-sign PIN field visible.

Given Step 4 Submit succeeds, when createDraftSO completes, then router.push to /orders/{id} and success toast shown; UI closeout includes Playwright trace + per-step screenshots per UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY; Playwright fallback documented if unavailable.
test_strategy: RED: RTL specs per step + Zod refinement tests + permission-gate test for allergen override.
risk_red_lines: Do not run allergen cascade purely client-side.
Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim.
Do not bypass server-side createDraftSO Zod re-validation.
Do not perpetuate BL-SHIP-02 collapse bug.
